cmd: source ~/venv/bin/activate && cd ~/proj && python scripts/ingest_task.py --out local-data/hero_s1/space-ingest --config-version hero-s1-space-v1 --vocab fixtures/hero_s1/space_vocab.json --box-threshold 0.25 --tile-box-threshold 0.22 --frame-batch-size 2 --no-stationary-tiles --videos new_1=local-data/hero_s1/new_1.mp4 && python scripts/space_observation_adapter.py --ingest-dir local-data/hero_s1/space-ingest/new_1 --vocab fixtures/hero_s1/space_vocab.json --out-dir results/hero_s1/space-auto --video-id new_1
